0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Cron Deployment"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Run Mnemosyne consolidation and maintenance as scheduled batch processes."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Use Cases"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Daily consolidation jobs"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Periodic backups via disaster recovery module"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Database maintenance"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Crontab Example"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Edit crontab\ncrontab -e\n\n# Daily consolidation at 3 AM via Hermes\n0 3 * * * cd /path/to/project && hermes mnemosyne sleep >> /var/log/mnemosyne/consolidate.log 2>&1\n\n# Daily backup at 4 AM\n0 4 * * * /opt/mnemosyne/venv/bin/mnemosyne backup --output-dir /backups >> /var/log/mnemosyne/backup.log 2>&1\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation via Hermes"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Consolidation runs through the Hermes plugin command:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Run consolidation manually\nhermes mnemosyne sleep\n\n# Or programmatically in Python\nfrom mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(db_path=\"/data/mnemosyne.db\")\nmem.sleep()  # Run consolidation\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No Standalone Consolidate Command"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne-consolidate"}]," CLI tool. Consolidation is only available via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]," tool or by calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," programmatically."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Backup"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Backup via the CLI:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Automated backup via CLI\nmnemosyne backup --output-dir /backups\n\n# Programmatically\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom mnemosyne.dr.recovery import create_backup\n\nbackup_path = create_backup(\n  db_path=Path(\"/data/mnemosyne.db\"),\n  backup_dir=Path(\"/backups\")\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Monitoring Cron Jobs"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Add to crontab\nMAILTO=admin@example.com\n\n# Log to file\n0 3 * * * cd /path/to/project && hermes mnemosyne sleep >> /var/log/mnemosyne/consolidate.log 2>&1\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Cron Best Practice"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use absolute paths for all commands and files.
